text:
Market today: Tech is getting hit hard, driven by chip stock weakness after Samsung's miss on AI expectations. This is the main driver for your concentrated book.

Your holdings: SOXL is a SELL (down 35.78%). QQQI is a TRIM (down 2.16%). These leveraged and income plays need attention.

Watch: Samsung's earnings miss and its impact on AI-driven chip demand.

Bottom line: Focus on managing your leveraged tech positions in this choppy market.
plays: SOXL: Action needed. Down 35.78%. Consider trimming or exiting this leveraged ETF.
QQQI: Action needed. Down 2.16%. Consider trimming this income anchor.
No new buys today - hold and watch
